---
name: Migration / Upgrade
about: Describe database, schema, or config migrations and upgrade plans
title: "[MIGRATE] <component>: short summary"
labels: migration, breaking-change
assignees: ''
---

### Summary
What is being migrated or upgraded?

### Reason
Why is this migration required now?

### Changes
Detailed list of DB schema changes, config updates, and code changes required.

### Migration plan
Step-by-step plan to apply the migration, including pre-checks and post-checks.

### Rollback plan
How to safely revert if the migration fails.

### Downtime / impact
Expected downtime, user impact, and maintenance windows.

### Testing
How to validate migration on staging and production (sample queries, scripts).

### Additional context
Links to docs, scripts, or related issues/PRs.
